ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "adult" INTEGER /* Adult content flag (0 or 1) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "original_language" INTEGER /* Original language of the movie (integer code) */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the movie metadata */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was added to the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the production company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the production company is based */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the production company is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the production company in the movie (e.g., producer, distributor) */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the production company was added to the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor in the movie */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor was added to the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_keywords" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the keyword was added to the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, movie critic) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the movie metadata */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_versions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "opening_weekend" REAL /* Opening weekend box office revenue */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Domestic box office gross revenue */,
  "international_gross" REAL /* International box office gross revenue */,
  "worldwide_gross" REAL /* Worldwide box office gross revenue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the box office data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audience entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the audience (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the audience (e.g., male, female) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the audience (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audience data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audience_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
